entries.title: convert lead and verify conversion details

params.data: [2026-04-07T17:59:30.057Z] [STEP] Verify homepage is loaded with m360Care branding

[2026-04-07T17:59:32.054Z] [STEP] Select leads list view: Today's Leads

step.title: Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: /Select a List View/i })
Click getByRole('button', { name: /Select a List View/i })
Scroll into view getByRole('option', { name: 'Today\'s Leads' }).first()

params.data: [2026-04-07T17:59:35.993Z] [PASS] Leads list view selected: Today's Leads

step.title: Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'john.doe303@example.com' }).first().locator('th a, a').first()
Click locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'john.doe303@example.com' }).first().locator('th a, a').first()

params.data: [2026-04-07T17:59:48.708Z] [PASS] Lead record opened using email match

step.title: Expect "toBeVisible" locator('section[role=\'dialog\'], .slds-modal').last().getByRole('heading', { name: /Your lead has been converted/i })

Scroll into view getByRole('option', { name: 'Today\'s Leads' }).first()
